properties.name: file.upload-dir
properties.description: Directory used to store uploaded files.

properties.name: app.admin.seed.enabled
properties.description: Whether to create the configured admin account on startup if it does not exist.

properties.name: app.admin.full-name
properties.description: Display name used for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: app.admin.email
properties.description: Email address used for the seeded admin account.

properties.name: app.admin.password
properties.description: Password used for the seeded admin account.
